## Catalog submission

- [ ] The package is an immutable `.ofmod` GitHub Release asset.
- [ ] Package id and version match its embedded manifest.
- [ ] `bytes` and lowercase SHA-256 describe the complete package.
- [ ] The thumbnail is an original 64x64 PNG with matching size and SHA-256.
- [ ] Supported game fingerprints, SDK version, capabilities, dependencies, and multiplayer policy are accurate.
- [ ] No private keys, credentials, game dumps, copyrighted game assets, or package binaries are committed.
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally.

Related submission issue: <!-- #123 or "direct PR" -->
